Walsall Councillors Cases PARLIAMENT Contributions Written Questions & Answers Early Day Motions NEWS Press Releases eNews Articles Videos SURGERIES GALLERY CONTACT Home Surgeries Surgeries Valerie holds regular surgeries for all constituents and has widened the number of venues to make them more accessible to everyone. For more information about surgeries or to book an appointment please phone 01922 635835. Please bring relevant documents with you to the surgery particularly with the relevant reference number so that Valerie can contact the appropriate person. Surgery History: 2025 Surgeries 2024 Surgeries 2023 Surgeries 2022 Surgeries 2021 Surgeries 2020 Surgeries 2019 Surgeries 2018 Surgeries 2017 Surgeries 2016 Surgeries 2015 Surgeries 2014 Surgeries 2013 Surgeries 2012 Surgeries 2011 Surgeries 2010 Surgeries To Contact Valerie Please click the link below and complete the form with all your details so your case can be processed. Contact form Surgeries Valerie holds regular surgeries which are currently by telephone. If you wish to contact Valerie, p lease use the contact form on the website or email Valerie at [email protected] or telephone on 01922 635835. You can call Monday-Friday 10:30 am to 1:00pm. Next surgery: 17 April 2026 at 2pm Claimant Rate in Walsall and Bloxwich Figures published today show that in March 2026: There were 6,065 claimants in Walsall and Bloxwich constituency, which was 7.7% of the population aged 16-64. The equivalent UK claimant rate was 4.0%. Number of claimants was down 335 from last year. There were 1,320 claimants aged 18-24.
